# CoffeeSchema

> **Service Layer**

```ts
const CoffeeSchema: Struct<{
  id: typeof Number$;
  name: typeof String$;
  size: typeof String$;
  price: typeof Number$;
  iced: typeof Boolean$;
  caffeineMg: typeof Number$;
}>;
```

Defined in: [src/app/service/coffee/types.ts:48](https://github.com/EmperorRAG/first-mcp/blob/3d2831b148eaa4c84c57fa062fce6df920f72a50/src/app/service/coffee/types.ts#L48)

Effect [Schema.Struct](https://effect-ts.github.io/effect/) defining the shape of a coffee catalog
entry.

## Remarks

Acts as the single source of truth for the [Coffee](../type-aliases/Coffee.md) entity.  The
struct declares six fields:

| Field        | Schema                                                | Purpose                                     |
| ------------ | ----------------------------------------------------- | ------------------------------------------- |
| `id`         | [Schema.Number](https://effect-ts.github.io/effect/)  | Unique numeric identifier                   |
| `name`       | [Schema.String](https://effect-ts.github.io/effect/)  | Display name (e.g. `"Flat White"`)          |
| `size`       | [Schema.String](https://effect-ts.github.io/effect/)  | Cup size (`"Small"`, `"Medium"`, `"Large"`) |
| `price`      | [Schema.Number](https://effect-ts.github.io/effect/)  | Price in US dollars                         |
| `iced`       | [Schema.Boolean](https://effect-ts.github.io/effect/) | Whether the drink is served iced            |
| `caffeineMg` | [Schema.Number](https://effect-ts.github.io/effect/)  | Caffeine content in milligrams              |

The schema is consumed by the MCP tool layer (via
`toStandardSchema`) to generate the JSON Schema advertised to MCP
clients, and by the repository layer to type the in-memory catalog.

## Example

```ts
import { Schema } from "effect";
import { CoffeeSchema } from "./types.js";

const decoded = Schema.decodeUnknownSync(CoffeeSchema)({
  id: 1, name: "Latte", size: "Large",
  price: 5.25, iced: true, caffeineMg: 150,
});
```
